message:
🌱 Add cert-manager: ClusterIssuer Secrets and Challenges unable to find secret mission (#1222)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "cert-manager-7331-clusterissuer-secrets-and-challenges-unable-to-find-secret",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "cert-manager: ClusterIssuer Secrets and Challenges unable to find secret",
+    "description": "ClusterIssuer Secrets and Challenges unable to find secret. This issue affects 24+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify cert-manager troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your cert-manager deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cert-manager\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cert-manager -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review cert-manager configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant cert-manager configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n cert-manager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cert-manager\nkubectl get configmap -n cert-manager -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=cert-manager\n```\n> 📢 cert-manager v1.16.1 has the fix for this bug."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for ClusterIssuer Secrets and Challenges unable to find secret",
+        "description": "cert-manager v1.16.1 has the fix for this bug. \n * https://github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager/releases/tag/v1.16.1\n```yaml\nE1007 06:31:50.878392       1 controller.go:157] \"re-queuing item due to error processing\" err=\"error getting route53 secret access key: secrets \\\"prod-route53-credentials-secret\\\" not found\" logger=\"cert-manager.controller\"\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm ClusterIssuer Secrets and Challenges unable to… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cert-manager -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "cert-manager v1.16.1 has the fix for this bug. \n * https://github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager/releases/tag/v1.16.1",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "E1007 06:31:50.878392       1 controller.go:157] \"re-queuing item due to error processing\" err=\"error getting route53 secret access key: secrets \\\"prod-route53-credentials-secret\\\" not found\" logger=\"cert-manager.controller\"",
+        "E1007 06:31:50.878392       1 controller.go:157] \"re-queuing item due to error processing\" err=\"error getting route53 secret access key: secrets \\\"prod-route53-credentials-secret\\\" not found in the namespace cert-manager\" logger=\"cert-manager.controller\""
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "cert-manager",
+      "graduated",
+      "security",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],

+      "Ingress",
+      "Namespace",
+      "Secret"
+    ],

+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager/issues/7331",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager"
+    },

+    "comments": 4,

+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with cert-manager installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
